MINISTRY OF CONSUMER AFFAIRS, FOOD AND PUBLIC DISTRIBUTION (Department of Consumer Affairs) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 51hJune, 2012 GS.R. 4%6(E).-ln exercise oftbe powers conferred by su!J..secdon(1) read with clause 0) and (q) ofsub-sectioo (2) of Section 52 of the Legal Metrology Act, 2009 (l of2010)., the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Legal Metrology (packaged Commodities) Rules, 2011, namely :- l. (l) These rules may be called the Legal Metrology (Packaged Commodities) (Second Amendment) Amendment Rules, 2012. (2) They shall come into force on the date oflheir publication in the Official Gazette. 2, In the Legal Metrology (Packaged Commodities) (Third Amendment) Rules, 2011 ,- (i) for sub-rule (2) of rule I, the following sub-rule shall be substituted, namely ;- "(2) Save as otherwisepsovided, these rules shall come into force from Ist July, 2012." (li) in rule 2. for clause (a) the following clause shall be substituted, namely ;- "(a) The proviso to rule 5 shall beomitted from 1st November. 2012." [F. No. wsr-u (13)/2010] RAJIV AGARWAL. Secy, Note: The prillCtpal rules were published inthe GazetteofIndia, vide, notificationnumber GS.R. 202(E). dated 7thMarch. 2011 and last amended, vide, notification numberG.SR 784(E), dated 24th October, 2011.
